title: 15mm Yellow Ribbon for Gift Wrapping 22M,Yellow Satin Ribbons Fabric 15mm Thick for Crafting Hair Bow Christmas Polyester Ribbon Cake Wedding Party Balloon Car Ribbons Decoration
features: 💗Satin Ribbon：Each pack contains 1 spool of ribbon,Our handmade DIY satin ribbon includes 20 colors (Red, Orange, Gold, Green, Blue, Purple,Yellow,Armygreen,Black,Coffee,Rose,Bean Pink,Champagne,White,Wine red.....) and 7 different sizes （6mm,10mm,15mm,20mm,25mm,50mm,75mm）The ribbon is easy to cut with scissors so can be cut to any preferred length

🧡Ribbons For Gift Wrapp Material:The ribbon has a shiny and smooth surface on both sides. Soft and silky material that can be used to make different shapes. Hair Ribbon for Women,Balloon Ribbon Present Ribbon Fabric Thick Ribbon for Crafting,Xmas,Florist,Bouquet,Wedding Car,Cake Decorations

💛Multlfunctional Ribbon: Our multicolor satin ribbons This is a DIY product, so you can adjust the ribbon and design color combinations according to your needs and preferences. Can be used as a party backdrops, wedding decor, wedding car decor, card making,photo booth, table skirt, chair skirt/sash, bouquet wrapping, gift wrapping, making bows, sewing, DIY Crafts Creative Satin Ribbon and so on.
💚Easy To Use: Wide Ribbon for Gift WrappingSmooth surface without wrinkles, no ironing required before use, can be cut at will.

💙Wide Usage:Polyester Ribbon Balloon Ribbon Suitable for your Scrapbook, bookmarks, gift cards, ribbon bows, decoration on lampshade, teddy bears, ribbons for hair, bags, baby pram, basket handle, champagne glasses Shoes, handbags, ribbon embroidery, ribbon bracelet, make ribbons for top of gift boxes, make ribbon bows / rosebuds and many more things.
